meaning: n.乘用马,衬纸,山,装配vi.乘马,爬上,增长vt.爬上,使上马,装上,设置,安放,制作...的标本,上演
examples: Mount Marcy is the highest mountain in the Adirondacks.
Mexico's Mount Colima began spewing lava and ash last night.
At 6, 400 feet, the Sunrise Area of Mount Rainier is the highest point accessible by vehicle.
And Elliott believes there is still plenty of time for the club to mount a promotion challenge.
